extraction.one_line_summary: TRATNIK Jan soloed to victory after attacking 40km out on Monte Ragogna, holding off O'CONNOR Ben who closed a 40-second gap but couldn't pass on the final climb.
tactical_patterns: TRATNIK Jan paced his solo perfectly, allowing O'CONNOR to bridge before final climb then re-attacking when fresher
28-rider breakaway fragmented through disorganization rather than strength differential, enabling late solos from smaller groups
ALMEIDA João attacked final kilometer to gain bonus seconds on rivals, extending pink jersey lead through marginal gains

rider_signals.TRATNIK Jan: positive: demonstrated superior pacing intelligence by conserving energy during bridge attempt then counterattacking decisively
rider_signals.O'CONNOR Ben: positive: closed 40-second gap through aggressive chase but lacked final punch to overtake, signaling strong diesel engine
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: actively hunting bonus seconds in final kilometer despite holding pink, showing confidence and offensive mindset before Madonna di Campiglio
rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: negative: lost 2 seconds in final kilometer to Almeida, indicating inability to respond to late accelerations
rider_signals.VISCONTI Giovanni: neutral: controlled mountains jersey battle without winning stage, losing only 1 point through strategic positioning
rider_signals.SWIFT Ben: neutral: animated chase for breakaway survivors but faded on final climb, suggesting one-day diesel rather than punch
